title: Senior Financial Analyst - Punjab National Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Punjab National Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Punjab National Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Punjab National Bank:
Punjab National Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank!
